message:
✨ Extract hardcoded strings to i18n (Auto-QA #10504) (#10506)

* ✨ Extract hardcoded strings to i18n (Auto-QA #10504)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Move i18n keys to common namespace to fix build

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
